primary_text:
I used to buy everything from the supermarket. I never thought twice about it.

Then I visited a regenerative farm in Kempsey. I watched how the animals were raised. Pasture, not feedlots. No hormones, no shortcuts. I met the farmer. I ate the food.

That was the day I realised what we'd all been missing.

I co-founded FarmThru to give every family access to food like this. 50+ regenerative farms, one hub, real food you can trace back to the paddock.

-- Rachel Ward, co-founder
headline: I didn't know what I was missing
description: Rachel Ward, co-founder. Real food from 50+ regenerative farms across NSW.
creative_brief: Warm portrait of Rachel on farm. Golden hour light. Casual, approachable. Text overlay with her name and 'co-founder' in small type.
